title: Earth Science Data
description: NASA’s Earth Science Data Systems (ESDS) Program oversees the entire Earth science data life cycle and facilitates unrestricted access to maximize the scientific return from NASA's missions and experiments.
text:
Your Gateway to NASA Earth Observation Data
NASA's Earthdata website
The Earth Science Data Systems (ESDS) Program provides open access to NASA’s archive of Earth science data, empowering researchers and decision makers to better understand and protect our home planet.
Explore
